name: Firefighters Credit Union
description_short: Firefighters Credit Union is an Indianapolis-based credit union offering online banking, savings accounts, loans, and ATM access through a nationwide network of 35,000+ surcharge-free ATMs and 5,550+ shared branches.
description_long:
Firefighters Credit Union operates as a member-owned financial cooperative based in Indianapolis, Indiana, serving the local community from its primary location at 726 Massachusetts Avenue. The credit union specializes in providing financial services tailored to firefighters and eligible members, with a focus on competitive rates and personalized member service. The organization has been structured around the credit union model, which emphasizes member benefits over profit maximization.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of banking services including FIREnet online banking with 24-hour account access, savings accounts, mortgages, and various loan products. Members can conduct transactions such as checking account balances, reviewing transaction history, transferring funds between accounts, paying bills online, and managing loan information through their online platform. Additional services include ATM access via CIRRUS and STAR networks, telephone banking through their 24-hour STARline system, ACH deposits, automatic transfers, and Visa debit cards. The credit union participates in nationwide share branching networks providing access to 5,000+ locations.

Firefighters Credit Union distinguishes itself through its participation in extensive ATM and shared branch networks, offering members surcharge-free access to 35,000+ ATMs and 5,550+ shared branch locations nationwide. The organization advertises competitive mortgage and savings rates and emphasizes member service with dedicated loan department and member service representatives. Operating hours are limited to weekday service (8:30 a.m. to 5:00 p.m., with Wednesday starting at 9:30 a.m.) with closures on weekends and fire department functions, reflecting its community-focused mission.

As a credit union, Firefighters Credit Union serves members rather than shareholders, typically resulting in better rates and lower fees than traditional banks. However, membership eligibility may be restricted, and the limited physical branch hours (closed weekends) may inconvenience some members. The organization's size and local focus in Indianapolis suggest it may have fewer technological features compared to larger national financial institutions, though FIREnet provides essential online banking functionality.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Access to 35,000+ surcharge-free ATMs nationwide and 5,550+ shared branch locations through partnership networks
24-hour FIREnet online banking with bill pay, fund transfers, and account inquiries
24-hour STARline telephone banking for account access and transactions
Competitive mortgage and savings rates explicitly advertised
ACH direct deposit acceptance for payroll, Social Security, and pension payments
Automatic transfer capabilities for loan payments and account management
No-fee Visa debit card with ATM withdrawal and enhanced security features
Member-owned credit union structure typically offering lower fees and better rates than traditional banks
cons: Physical branch limited to single location in Indianapolis with restricted hours (closed weekends and during fire department functions)
Membership eligibility likely restricted to firefighters or affiliated groups, limiting accessibility
Limited online platform features compared to larger national banks and fintech competitors
No mention of mobile banking app availability on provided website content
Limited product diversity — no mention of credit cards, investment services, or other advanced financial products
best_for: Firefighters and eligible family members in the Indianapolis area seeking member-owned banking
Members prioritizing nationwide ATM/branch access through shared networks over physical local branches
Consumers wanting competitive rates on mortgages and savings accounts with personalized service
Individuals preferring credit union membership structure and member-focused operations over traditional banks
diagnosis: Firefighters Credit Union is best suited for firefighters and eligible family members in the Indianapolis area who value credit union membership benefits, competitive rates, and nationwide ATM/branch access through shared networks. The primary caveat is membership eligibility restrictions and limited physical branch availability, making it less convenient for those requiring frequent in-person service or unable to meet membership requirements.
services: FIREnet 24-hour online banking with bill pay and fund transfers
Share branching access to 5,000+ locations nationwide
ATM access via CIRRUS and STAR networks (35,000+ surcharge-free ATMs)
ACH direct deposit for payroll and government benefits
Automatic account and loan payment transfers
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
